name: warden
description: Trustless agent vault for tokenized real-world assets

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @warden/contracts test && pnpm --filter @warden/imessage test && pnpm --filter @warden/monitor test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @warden/agent build && pnpm --filter @warden/monitor build && pnpm --filter @warden/imessage build && pnpm --filter @warden/dashboard build
scripts.demo: pnpm --filter @warden/agent demo && pnpm --filter @warden/monitor demo && pnpm --filter @warden/imessage demo
scripts.verify:submission: pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm demo && pnpm e2e && pnpm swarm:ci && pnpm stylus:check && pnpm preflight:robinhood
scripts.deploy:official: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/contracts && forge script script/DeployOfficial.s.sol:DeployOfficial --rpc-url "$WARDEN_DEPLOY_RPC_URL" --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY" --broadcast
scripts.deploy:official-vault: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/contracts && forge script script/DeployOfficialVault.s.sol:DeployOfficialVault --rpc-url "$WARDEN_DEPLOY_RPC_URL" --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY" --broadcast
scripts.monitor:authorize: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/contracts && forge script script/AuthorizeMonitor.s.sol:AuthorizeMonitor --rpc-url "$WARDEN_DEPLOY_RPC_URL" --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY" --broadcast
